arts.sum: Lazio will resume their European campaign this week when they take on Viktoria Plzen in the first leg of the Europa League Round of 16. Viktoria Plzen vs Lazio Kick-Off Time, Location & Where to Watch The Europa League clash between Viktoria Plzen and Lazio kicks off at 21:00 CET on Thursday 6th March.
